article_meta.title: Defense Coast Guard denies report it won't classify swastikas, nooses as hate symbols by Filip Timotija 11/20/25 03:23 P

reasoning: The model labeled a largely straight-news, neutral Hill report as Left with relatively high confidence. It relied on vague framing claims and one attribution violation (using the quoted 'review the language' as an indicator), and offered little specific author-prose evidence. The article’s authorial tone and structure are closer to Center; at most Lean Left due to inclusion of a Democrat’s critique, so the model is two classes off.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Actual lean appears Center (balanced, reportorial tone). Model chose Left—two classes off.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.72 is too high given the article’s neutral/centered signal and the wrong-side classification.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Evidence is mostly vague structural claims; includes an attribution violation referencing a quoted phrase; minimal specific author-prose citations.
